author: @RoryMitchell00
text: I can guarantee that Ironheart will fight legions and legions of faceless males who are all evil, and probably even "game end" them without feeling any remorse. Because while we have to have diversity and equity in our heroes, all the villains are still 99% men. Of course. Interestingly, Thunderbolts is the worst offender in this arena, with over two dozen unnamed males ended (and that's a conservative estimate) in the film, while the CIA director who employed them is given a promotion at the end of the story. Gee, I wonder why *she* didn't get held accountable for wielding innocent men's lives so callously when committing her crimes?
